
# 问题

```bash
make docker-run
The command 'docker' could not be found in this WSL 1 distro.We recommend to convert this distro to WSL 2 and activate the WSL integration in Docker Desktop settings.For details about using Docker Desktop with WSL 2, visit: https://docs.docker.com/go/wsl2/ 
make: *** [Makefile:45: docker-run] Error 1
```

# 查看wsl -l -v版本

# 升级
wsl --set-version Ubuntu 2

# 重启即可
